query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "abot-earth 0.5: generative 3d earth model" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the core mechanism of "generative 3D Earth Model" research by providing a canonical method for "3D-aware image synthesis" and "shape-accurate" reconstruction from 2D images, which satisfies criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (d) as a foundational methodology for the specific technical challenge of resolving shape-color ambiguity in generative 3D models.
